Metadata.title: Orlidan Montesdeoca | Business Technology & Automation Consultant
Metadata.description: Business scalability specialist through intelligent automation, Docker infrastructure, and Open Source solutions.

Hero.description: I help companies scale through intelligent automation, optimizing processes and connecting technology with business objectives.

About.title: Business <technology>Technology</technology> & <automation>Automation</automation>
About.description: Technology consultant with an integral approach that bridges the worlds of IT, marketing, and business strategy. I help companies scale through intelligent automation, optimizing their infrastructure with Docker and adapting open-source solutions to their specific needs. My goal is to transform complex data into real competitive advantages.

items.description: Management of specialized teams in the development of automation technologies and AI solutions.
achievements: Strategic leadership in business automation projects
Architecture of AI-based solutions and data orchestration
Development of technological vision for the IONOS HUB ecosystem

items.description: Leadership in the implementation of automation and AI ecosystems to optimize marketing and operations processes.
achievements: Design of 22 flows in n8n, Zapier, and RAGFlow for AI agents
Deployment of custom APIs in Flask on Google Cloud Run
Bare Metal server administration with Docker and Portainer
Implementation of LLM orchestration (GPT-4, Claude 3.5, LLaMA 3)

items.description: Automation of audit processes and credit risk analysis using BI tools and scripting.
achievements: Creation of 32 VBA macros for cleaning and report generation
Design of 12 interactive dashboards in Power BI for audit tracking
Execution of complex SQL queries for credit policy verification
ETL processes from 12 different sources ensuring data quality

items.description: Supply chain optimization and resource management for social impact.
achievements: Management of +40 types of food inventory with full traceability
Logistics planning for distribution to +5 social centers
Development of monitoring system for mobile assets
Implementation of waste management and composting processes

items.title: AI Automation Ecosystem
items.description: Scalable architecture integrating GCP, n8n, and WhatsApp Business API (WABA) for AI agent orchestration and mass communication flows.
items.longDescription: This ecosystem allows the creation and deployment of custom AI agents that interact in real-time with users via WhatsApp. It uses n8n as a central orchestration engine, processing data in GCP and connecting with multiple LLMs to offer intelligent responses and automate complex workflows.

items.title: SRI Billing System
items.description: Electronic billing solution for Ecuadorian companies with automatic stamping to SRI and custom notifications.
items.longDescription: Robust system that automates the entire electronic billing cycle in Ecuador. Includes generating signed XML, authorization inquiry to SRI, RIDE generation, and automatic custom invoice delivery via SMTP.

items.title: Data Analysis
items.description: Advanced interactive dashboards in Power BI with integration of relational models, SQL, and complex ETL processes.
items.longDescription: Development of BI ecosystems focused on descriptive analytics and historical visualization. Implementation of advanced DAX for complex calculations, SQL query optimization for data extraction, and ETL flow automation via Power Query to ensure relational model integrity.

items.title: Dockerization & Cloud Infrastructure
items.description: Implementation of robust systems in VPS and cloud services using Linux and orchestration with Docker and Portainer.
items.longDescription: Specialist in migrating and deploying applications to scalable infrastructures. Comprehensive management of Linux servers, acquisition and configuration of cloud services, and container administration via Docker. Implementation of Portainer for visual and efficient management of complex technological stacks.
